title: Emerging Leaders in the Americas Program (ELAP)
description: Government of Canada-funded short-term exchange program for students from Latin America and the Caribbean to study or research at a Canadian post-secondary institution. Covers airfare, living expenses, health insurance, and visa/permit fees. Funding is awarded to Canadian institutions, who select and host individual students — check with a participating Canadian college or university for their specific call and deadline.
visaNote: Study/work permit fees are covered as part of the program.

title: Young Leaders of the Americas Initiative (YLAI) Fellowship
description: U.S. State Department fellowship for young entrepreneurs from Latin America, the Caribbean, and Canada: a four-week professional placement with a U.S. host organization plus housing and meal stipends. All costs — travel, accommodation, meals, and insurance — are covered. Applications typically open in June and close in early July each year.
visaNote: J-1 exchange visitor visa sponsored by the program.
